## Summary

Short description of user-visible changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] CLI-visible docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/cli.md`, `docs/output.md`, etc.)
- [ ] Schema/exit-code compatibility reviewed when behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Security/trust-boundary impact reviewed if integrations or profile loading changed
